archive_data.question_text: As per the Union Budget 2020, which of the following taxes has been abolished?

options.text: Long term capital gains tax on securities

explanation.english: The Union Budget 2020 abolished the Dividend Distribution Tax (DDT). Previously, companies paid DDT at 15% on dividends distributed. Now, the dividend income is taxable in the hands of the shareholders/recipients.
explanation.tanglish: Union Budget 2020-la Dividend Distribution Tax (DDT) niruthappaattapattadhu. Mundhinam companies 15% DDT kattindu varundhu, ipo shareholders-kitta irundhu tax vaangappadum.

archive_data.question_text: The microbes that lie on the border line of the living and non-living world are called:

explanation.english: Viruses are considered to be on the borderline between living and non-living organisms because they can only reproduce inside host cells and do not have cellular machinery of their own.
explanation.tanglish: Viruses living and non-living idaiyil border-la irukkum. Avai host cells ullaye reproduction seiya mudiyum, aana avukku thaniyaaga cellular illa.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following Articles of the Constitution of India contains the directive that the State shall make provision for maternity relief?

explanation.english: Article 42 of the Indian Constitution directs the State to make provision for securing just and humane conditions of work and for maternity relief.
explanation.tanglish: Indian Constitution Article 42, State-ku maternity relief kudukka provision seiyya solli directive kodukkum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following Articles of the Constitution of India prohibits the Indian State from conferring any title, except a military or academic distinction?

explanation.english: Article 18(1) of the Constitution prohibits the State from conferring any titles except military or academic distinctions.
explanation.tanglish: Constitution Article 18(1), State military or academic distinction thavira vera title yellam kudukka mudiyadhu endru koorum.

archive_data.question_text: With which of the following states is the theatre form 'Maach' traditionally associated?

explanation.english: Maach is a traditional folk theatre form of Madhya Pradesh, involving music, dance and dialogues.
explanation.tanglish: Maach Madhya Pradesh-ku uriya traditonal natakam. Ithil music, dance, pesa podhu.

archive_data.question_text: Atanu Das, who was awarded the Arjuna Award 2020, is a professional player of:

explanation.english: Atanu Das is an Indian archer who received the Arjuna Award in 2020 for his excellence in archery.
explanation.tanglish: Atanu Das oru Indian archer. Avarku 2020-la Arjuna Award archery-la perform panna kudukkappattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following books was conferred the International Booker Prize 2020?

options.text: The Enlightenment of the Greengage Tree

explanation.english: The Discomfort of Evening by Marieke Lucas Rijneveld won the International Booker Prize 2020.
explanation.tanglish: The Discomfort of Evening Marieke Lucas Rijneveld ezhuthiyathu, International Booker Prize 2020 vangiyadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following was appointed as the Chairperson of Advisory Committee on Corporate Insolvency Resolution and Liquidation process in June 2020?

explanation.english: Uday Kotak was appointed as Chairperson of the Advisory Committee on Corporate Insolvency Resolution and Liquidation Process by the IBBI in June 2020.
explanation.tanglish: Uday Kotak, June 2020-la IBBI Corporate Insolvency Resolution and Liquidation Committee chairperson-ah appoint senjanga.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following states does NOT share its border with West Bengal?

explanation.english: West Bengal shares borders with Jharkhand, Bihar, Odisha, Sikkim and Assam, but not with Meghalaya.
explanation.tanglish: West Bengal Jharkhand, Bihar, Odisha, Sikkim, Assam oda border share pannum, aana Meghalaya oda illa.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following has been selected for the 2020 World Food Prize?

explanation.english: Dr. Rattan Lal was awarded the 2020 World Food Prize for developing and mainstreaming a soil-centric approach to increasing food production and restoring degraded soils.
explanation.tanglish: Dr. Rattan Lal, soil-centric approach-la food production increase panna World Food Prize 2020 vanginar.

archive_data.question_text: As per the new income tax regime announced in the Union Budget 2020, the tax rate for taxable income between ₹5 lakh to ₹7.5 lakh has been reduced to:

explanation.english: Under the new income tax regime announced in Budget 2020, the tax rate for income between ₹5 lakh to ₹7.5 lakh was reduced to 10%.
explanation.tanglish: Budget 2020-la puthiya tax regime-la, ₹5 lakh irundhu ₹7.5 lakh vara income-ku 10% tax.
